title: Council recess means wait for gun discussion
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The issue of firing a...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The issue of firing a gun during a traditional ceremony in Kwanokuthula on Sunday 21 December, allegedly by Bitou deputy mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi, is only expected to be discussed in mid-January by the council.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The issue of firing a gun during a traditional ceremony in Kwanokuthula on Sunday 21 December, allegedly by Bitou deputy mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi, is only expected to be discussed in mid-January by the council."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bitou Speaker Mavis Busakwe has reacted to the alleged firing of a gun by Kolwapi, saying Bitou council will consider and address the matter “through the appropriate Council processes in accordance with the law and established governance procedures”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Busakwe indicated that “as the public is aware “the council is in recess” .","html":"Busakwe indicated that “as the public is aware “the council is in recess” ."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The next council meeting is scheduled on 14 January 2026. She said in a statement to the Knysna Plett Herald: “However, once the Council reconvenes, the matter will be considered and addressed through the appropriate Council processes, in accordance with the law and established governance procedures.","html":"The next council meeting is scheduled on 14 January 2026. She said in a statement to the Knysna Plett Herald: “However, once the Council reconvenes, the matter will be considered and addressed through the appropriate Council processes, in accordance with the law and established governance procedures."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“The Council respects the rule of law and will allow due process to take its course,” said Busakwe."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Busakwe said she took “note of and acknowledge the incident that has been reported, as well as the related public inquiries”.","html":"Busakwe said she took “note of and acknowledge the incident that has been reported, as well as the related public inquiries”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jump the gunShe did she had since been made aware that a case has been opened by the South African Police Service, and that the matter is currently under investigation by the relevant authorities.","html":"Jump the gun
She did she had since been made aware that a case has been opened by the South African Police Service, and that the matter is currently under investigation by the relevant authorities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DA councillor Bill Nel in an interview with Newzroom Afrika on Tuesday 23 December said the council could not “jump the gun and make decisions and do things ahead of time”.","html":"DA councillor Bill Nel in an interview with Newzroom Afrika on Tuesday 23 December said the council could not “jump the gun and make decisions and do things ahead of time”."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“We've got to follow the processes,” as Busakwe had indicated too. He said local government “is a creature of statute, and we have to stay within that framework”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said he knew Kolwapi personally and that she is “a passionate lady, and she is a champion for female rights, and against gender-based violence”.","html":"He said he knew Kolwapi personally and that she is “a passionate lady, and she is a champion for female rights, and against gender-based violence”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We also know that this is an extremely important cultural event in the transition from boyhood to manhood. So it was an emotional period, and I think perhaps emotions got a bit too high, being a passionate kind of person,” he said in the interview.","html":"“We also know that this is an extremely important cultural event in the transition from boyhood to manhood. So it was an emotional period, and I think perhaps emotions got a bit too high, being a passionate kind of person,” he said in the interview."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Asked by Newzroom Afrika whether there was “something to investigate” besides the law enforcement processes unfolding, Nel responded that “nothing could happen which is not guided by regulations and laws”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are in a municipality. We're in a local government. Everything is controlled. So at this stage, I cannot say to you that I'm condemning her, because I don't know.","html":"“We are in a municipality. We're in a local government. Everything is controlled. So at this stage, I cannot say to you that I'm condemning her, because I don't know."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The facts are not clear yet. They are under investigation. If, however, those facts become clear, and there is truth to the matter, then there is a process which has to be followed strictly in terms of the law.” He said the process had to be initiated by the Speaker.","html":"“The facts are not clear yet. They are under investigation. If, however, those facts become clear, and there is truth to the matter, then there is a process which has to be followed strictly in terms of the law.” He said the process had to be initiated by the Speaker."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unwise“The Speaker will then get to call together a committee. That committee will then make recommendations.","html":"Unwise
“The Speaker will then get to call together a committee. That committee will then make recommendations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Those recommendations will then go to the the MEC for Local Government of the province, and the sanctions may be anything from temporary suspension to removal from council.","html":"“Those recommendations will then go to the the MEC for Local Government of the province, and the sanctions may be anything from temporary suspension to removal from council."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“We don't know, and I don't want to go ahead of myself as far as that's concerned,” said Nel."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Asked by Newzroom Afrika about the political perspective (as Kolwapi, a proportional representation councillor, and her Ikhwezi Political Movement are part of the DA-led coalition in Bitou), Nel responded: “We would say we think it was an unwise thing that took place.","html":"Asked by Newzroom Afrika about the political perspective (as Kolwapi, a proportional representation councillor, and her Ikhwezi Political Movement are part of the DA-led coalition in Bitou), Nel responded: “We would say we think it was an unwise thing that took place."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“It was uncalled for, and it's not a good thing that took place. But I cannot give you now any final outcome yet. We don't think it is a wonderful thing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We think it was an emotional thing that took place. We think it was a big event, a cultural event. But other than that, if it does come to pass that there is any guilt, action will be taken.”","html":"“We think it was an emotional thing that took place. We think it was a big event, a cultural event. But other than that, if it does come to pass that there is any guilt, action will be taken.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou Speaker Mavis Busakwe.Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"Bitou Speaker Mavis Busakwe.Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Ratepayers reject deputy mayor’s statement","Bitou deputy mayor under fire","Charges laid over discharge of firearm in Kwanokuthula"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Council recess means wait for gun discussion
Council recess means wait for gun discussion
